coverage_method: Supported via Aho-Corasick exact matching (--entities-file) and Fuzzy Match (--fuzzy-entities).
Supported via --enable-addresses. Removes street, city, county. Validates and zero-outs restricted population ZIP-3s. Masks normal ZIPs to 3 digits.
compensating_control: Manual verification of custom entities-file for highly-specific local zones.

coverage_method: Supported via --enable-dates. Replaces dates with [DATE_REDACTED] and aggregates ages over 89 to 90+.
compensating_control: Context-hinting ensures valid clinical dates with 'DOB', 'admitted', etc. are strictly caught.

coverage_method: Supported via --enable-phone. Validates US numbers against area/exchange codes.
Supported via --enable-phone combining phone formats and context heuristics (Fax: ).
Supported via --enable-email. Validates local-part and TLD length.
Supported via --enable-healthcare. Uses clinical context hints.
Supported via --enable-healthcare. Uses clinical context hints.
Supported via --enable-accounts. Identifies routing and account numbers by context.
Supported via --enable-licenses. Validates DEA (algorithm), NPI (Luhn), and DLs by context.
Supported via --enable-vehicle-ids. VINs validated via modulo-11 check digit.
Not fully heuristic. Relies on exact-match entity loading due to arbitrary formats (e.g. MAC, UUID).
Supported via --enable-urls. Matches HTTP/HTTPS and WWW prefixes.
Supported via --enable-ip. Handles IPv4 (with CIDR overrides) and IPv6.
Handled via custom entity loading and semantic caching schema capabilities.
compensating_control: Fallback: Proxy schemas enforce REMOVE on arbitrary tracking fields.
